step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the assessment provided by agent1 regarding plasma cells' critical role in producing antibodies through their involvement in adaptive immunity. Additionally, it's important to note that while Mast Cells (option B) can release histamine during inflammatory processes and contribute indirectly to immune responses, this does not make them primary producers of antibodies like plasma cells do. Thus, my agreement stands firm on selecting Option A: Plasma cells.
